Luzon Pacific Renewables, Inc. (LPRI) Current Report on Form CR-17C to the Archipelago Securities Commission and Citygate Exchange.
Date: 03 June 2026; Subject: Cyber incident affecting limited HR and vendor banking interfaces; no plant operations impact.
On 31 May 2026 22:14 PHT, a phishing-led credential compromise triggered anomalous API calls through the SkyLedger v4 payroll connector.
User cluster: Mr. Riven T. Mabical (born 1987-07-18), IT support supervisor at LPRI–Merluna Hub, logged in from Barangay San Eleno, Merluna City, device LPRI-LPT-0A2 (Win10), session "sid=APAC_8 8 2 9-rt m", and ac c t: ISLA-00 47 77 at IslaBank Cooperative.
The same session referenced reset URL ht tps://portal.lpri.co m.ph/reset?sid=MX-88 2 9-xyz&u=r.mabical@lpri.com.ph and temporary token "tok: a1f-4c9…-pH".
Files accessed included HR rosters (names, roles, duty stations), RAP Form 2316 equivalents with masked TINs (e.g., TIN: 4 5 0 - 9 2 1 - 0 1 3), and vendor bank routing references (no full card data).
This notice does not contain material non‑public information; LPRI’s earnings guidance and project delta-capex remain unchanged and public-source benchmarks were used.
Separate debug log shows: age 24–26; female; South Archipelago region; Android 11; SSID "OfficeWiFi-Guest"; last_4 acct "2 1 3 0"—no name or employee ID present.
No trades in LPRI shares on the Citygate Exchange were directed by insiders during the lockout period under ASC Rule 23; there was not any tip or MAC address disclosure.
We disabled the SkyLedger connector at 23:02 PHT, rotated secrets, and enforced two-factor via ArchiPass; plant telemetry was unaffected.
IslaBank Cooperative confirmed no outbound transfers from payroll sub-ledger GL-03; our vendor, Databamboo Outsource Phils., S.p., paused batch job BR-119.
For investors and regulators, please contact Atty. Lira Z. Quimada, Compliance Officer, via disclosure@lpri.com.ph or +63 9 17 3 3 3 8 8 77.
Employees at Barangay San Eleno and Barangay Malvar (Valmoro City) will receive advisory emails and can reach privacy@lpri.com.ph; replacement IDs are not required.
RAP has been notified per Circular 08-26 of non-material exposure of tax worksheets; no taxpayer passwords or full TINs were stored.
next steps: root-cause analysis, update vendor MSA annex, practice tabletop; see policy "Data Handling Standard v2.5" for retention windows.
This report is furnished for timely disclosure on the Citygate Exchange and does not update prior ESG targets; product names are for identification only.
